_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Wholemounts of young (P45) control and Nf1-KO mouse skins showing distribution of Tom+ BC-derived Schwann cells (Tomato+)
details: Successfully labeled BC-derived Schwann cells in wholemounts and sections for quantification of Tom+ surface area
